---
title: "Gary's Website"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="profile-hero">
  <div class="profile-photo-wrap">
    <img src="assets/profile.jpg" alt="Profile photo" class="profile-photo" onerror="this.style.display='none'; document.querySelector('.profile-photo-placeholder').style.display='flex';" />
    <div class="profile-photo-placeholder">GC</div>
  </div>
  <div class="profile-text">
    <h1 class="profile-name">Grace Chang</h1>
    <p class="profile-title">GIS Researcher &amp; Educator</p>
    <p class="profile-affiliation">Department of Geography · University Name</p>
    <div class="profile-links">
      <a href="mailto:your@email.com" class="profile-link">✉ Email</a>
      <a href="cv/cv.pdf" class="profile-link" target="_blank">↗ CV</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/gchang1020" class="profile-link" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## About

I am a researcher and educator with expertise in geographic information systems (GIS) and spatial analysis. My work focuses on [your research area — e.g., urban analytics, environmental modeling, spatial data science].

I hold a Ph.D. in [Field] from [University], where my dissertation examined [brief dissertation topic]. I am passionate about making spatial thinking and data literacy accessible through teaching and open-source tools.

## Research Interests

- Spatial data analysis and visualization
- [Research interest 2]
- [Research interest 3]
- GIS applications in [domain]

## Education

**Ph.D., [Field]** · [University] · [Year]  
Dissertation: *[Your dissertation title]*

**M.S., [Field]** · [University] · [Year]

**B.S., [Field]** · [University] · [Year]

## Selected Publications

- Chang, G. ([Year]). [Title of paper]. *Journal Name*, vol(issue), pp. [DOI or link]
- Chang, G. ([Year]). [Title of paper]. *Conference/Journal Name*.

## Contact

I am based at [Location / Institution]. Feel free to reach out at [your@email.com](mailto:your@email.com).
